label: Correct
criteria: Correct modality contrast; realistic noise; consistent inter-tissue signal
examples: Correct T1/T2 gray-white contrast; HU within expected ranges

label: Minor deviation
criteria: Minor contrast deviation; tissue relationships near-correct
examples: Slightly elevated noise; minor inter-sequence inconsistency

label: Moderate error
criteria: Moderate signal errors; inconsistent inter-tissue relationships
examples: Gray-white contrast reversed; FLAIR partially unsuppressed in normal CSF

label: Critical failure
criteria: Wrong modality signal behavior; image does not behave as a measurement of stated quantity
examples: Inverted FLAIR; US without depth attenuation; CT with MRI-like soft tissue contrast

label: Correct
criteria: All expected artifacts present; geometry consistent with acquisition
examples: Streak artifact at titanium clip; posterior acoustic shadow at gallstone

label: Minor deviation
criteria: Minor artifact mismatch; expected artifacts present but reduced
examples: Streak artifact present but less pronounced than expected

label: Moderate error
examples: Streak artifact absent; acoustic shadow displaced

label: Critical failure
criteria: Physically impossible under stated acquisition constraints
examples: No beam hardening at titanium clip; no acoustic shadow at gallstone; free air in dependent spaces

label: Correct
criteria: Anatomically coherent; pathology morphologically and spatially plausible
examples: Infarct within MCA territory; free fluid in Morrison's pouch; gallstone at dependent pole

label: Minor deviation
criteria: Minor anatomical inconsistency; pathology mostly plausible
examples: Infarct mostly in MCA territory with minor extension

label: Moderate error
criteria: Moderate biological error; pathology partially implausible
examples: Infarct extending into adjacent territory without variant justification

label: Critical failure
examples: Infarct outside any vascular territory; blood anterior to bowel in supine patient; polyp mobile at dependent pole
